data.description:

source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/seeker-ships-august-4-solana-mobile-enters-web3-era/

data.title: Japanese Bank Reports Significant Losses Due to U.S. Treasury Sales
data.description: According to PANews, Japan's Norinchukin Bank has reported a substantial loss of 1.8 trillion yen (approximately $12.6 billion) for the fiscal year 2024, attributed to the large-scale sale of U.S. Treasuries and other foreign bonds. The bank's unrealized bond losses reached 1.24 trillion yen, with 20% of its investment portfolio consisting of collateralized loan obligations (CLOs). Arthur Hayes commented that this development could undermine other institutions' confidence in increasing their holdings of U.S. Treasuries, suggesting that another potential buyer has exited, further impacting demand for U.S. debt.

data.title: Merlin Chain native token MERL and USD1 trading pair are launched on BNB Chain, and liquidity ranks among the top three in the entire chain
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News PancakeSwap has now launched the MERL/USD1 trading pair, which has climbed to the third place in terms of liquidity, second only to Binance Ecological Token B and BNB. According to the official announcement, Binance will launch USD1 (World Liberty Financial USD) at 12:00 (UTC) on May 22, 2025, and open USD1/USDT trading.
Earlier news, after Binance Alpha launched MERL a few days ago, MERL rose by 26% within 24 hours. In addition, Binance simultaneously launched a MERL exclusive trading competition. From 09:00 (UTC) on May 20, 2025 to 09:00 (UTC) on June 3, 2025, the top 10,000 users who trade MERL through Binance Wallet or Binance Alpha platform can share a prize pool of more than 1 million US dollars.

data.title: James Wynn reduced his BTC long position and increased his PEPE long position
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to on-chain data, whale trader James Wynn continued to reduce his BTC long positions on Hyperliquid and gradually increased his PEPE long positions. Perhaps affected by this, the PEPE price broke through $0.0000145 in the short term, with a 24-hour increase of 8.01%.
Currently, the PEPE position of whale trader James Wynn is worth nearly $25 million, with a floating profit of nearly $8 million. In addition, he still holds 7,766 BTC long positions, with a floating profit of nearly $20 million.

data.title: Senior technician Hans Moog joins Kaspa as core researcher
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Hans Moog, a senior expert with 24 years of experience in programming and decentralized technology, officially joined Kaspa as a core researcher on May 21, a position funded by the Kaspa Foundation (@Kaspa_KEF).
Moog previously held a research position at IOTA and made outstanding contributions in the field of DAG distributed ledger technology. The main reason he chose to join Kaspa was that he agreed with the project's architectural design and decentralized concept. As an expert in PoW and DAG systems, he has begun to participate in the research and development of Kaspa 2.0 and zero-knowledge proofs.
Kaspa is a PoW project that was fairly launched in 2021. The current mining rate is 91%, the circulation rate is 91%, and the market value is about 3 billion US dollars.

data.title: Deadline Approaches for Migration of ethDYDX Tokens to Native Chain
data.description: According to PANews, the dYdX platform has announced that over 64.4 million ethDYDX tokens have yet to be migrated to the native DYDX chain. A community proposal, which received approximately 91% support, has set June 9, 2025, as the date for an on-chain vote to officially end support for the Ethereum to dYdX chain bridging contract. Users are urged to complete the migration promptly to avoid restrictions on their assets.

data.title: SEC Postpones Decision on Spot Solana ETF Proposals
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, May 22, 2025- The US Securities and Exchange Commission on Monday delayed its decision on several spot Solana exchange-traded fund applications, citing the need for additional time to assess legal and policy implications tied to the crypto investment products. In filings published Monday, the SEC said it was initiating formal proceedings to evaluate […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/sec-postpones-decision-on-spot-solana-etf-proposals

data.title: Forbes: Bitcoin Pizza Festival party revealed that the actual cost of buying pizza was nearly 100,000 BTC, and now the transaction wallet has been emptied
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: "Bitcoin Pizza Festival" party, programmer Laszlo Hanyecz, spent 10,000 BTC on May 22, 2010 in exchange for two large Papa John's pizzas, but most people don't realize that Laszlo Hanyecz spent up to 79,000 bitcoins on subsequent pizza purchases that day, which are now worth more than $8.7 billion. He also mentioned in an interview in 2019 that he spent nearly 100,000 BTC on pizzas in 2010.
In addition, in order to prove that all the bitcoins he held were used to buy pizza, Laszlo Hanyecz also published his bitcoin address on the Bitcointalk forum. The wallet showed that more than 79,000 bitcoins were sent from the date of creation on April 10, 2010 to August 4, 2010 (the day he ended the public transaction of bitcoin for pizza). The bitcoins in the wallet were emptied in June 2011, and the total outflow was slightly more than 81,432 bitcoins. (Forbes)

data.title: Ethereum's Profitability Sees Dramatic Fluctuations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum has experienced significant volatility since December 2024, when a major sell-off led to a sharp decline in the percentage of profitable addresses from over 90% to just 32% by April 2025. However, the rebound has been equally intense, with nearly 60% of holders now back in a profitable position. This level of fluctuation is unprecedented for Ethereum since 2017.

data.title: dYdX community releases proposal to remove EOS, BTRUMP and SKITTEN markets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: dYdX community released a proposal to "remove EOS, BTRUMP and SKITTEN markets". The proposal includes removing EOS, BTRUMP and SKITTEN markets. The reason is that EOS will be migrated, and the trading activities and liquidity of BTRUMP and SKITTEN are very limited.
